policy: Sound cues are low-level auditory bookmarks only. They must not cover Attention, RoPE, Q/K, n - m, theta_i, KV cache, or other technical terms.

cues.clarity_rule: Opening identity only; remove if it masks the first spoken clause.
Marks the PE input-addition visual; keep below voice and away from x = x + pe readout.
Marks Q/K rotation entry after the RoPE term has been spoken.
Formula reveal cue; do not overlap n - m or theta_i pronunciation.
Engineering-layer shift cue; must not cover the long-context explanation.
Feynman-summary cue; keep soft enough for subtitle readability and ASR.
Next-episode tail; do not cover KV cache or inference-speed terms.
